title: Investment Manager Downsizes Position in Global Electronics Supplier, According to Recent SEC Filing
author: Jake Lerch
description: Segall Bryant & Hamill, LLC reduced its Littelfuse holding by 20,392 shares (~$5.19 million) in Q4 2025. Despite the position reduction, Littelfuse stock has surged 47% over the past year, driven by AI demand for circuit protection and power management solutions. Analysts expect 21% revenue growth in 2026, though current trailing 12-month revenue remains 5% below three-year-ago levels.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Stock has appreciated 47% year-over-year and 42% year-to-date, benefiting from AI-driven demand for circuit protection solutions. Analysts project 21% revenue growth in 2026, indicating strong future prospects despite current revenue being below historical levels. The company is well-positioned to benefit from ancillary effects of the AI revolution.

title: GulfStar Group Announces the Acquisition of Basler Electric by Littelfuse
author: Gulfstar Group
description: Littelfuse, Inc. has acquired Basler Electric Company, a third-generation family-owned manufacturer of electrical control and protection solutions, for approximately $350 million in cash. The transaction closed on December 11, 2025, with GulfStar Group serving as the exclusive financial advisor. The acquisition enhances Littelfuse's presence in mission-critical, high-growth end markets including power generation, data centers, and industrial equipment.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Strategic acquisition of an established company with 80+ year brand reputation and strong market position in high-growth end markets. The deal expands Littelfuse's product portfolio and global reach in mission-critical applications.

title: Automotive Relay Market Size Worth USD 26.23 Bn By 2034 Amidst Rising EV Adoption and Advanced Safety Features
author: Precedence Research
description: The global automotive relay market is expected to grow from $14.92 billion in 2025 to $26.23 billion by 2034, driven by the rise of electric vehicles and advanced safety technologies.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Panasonic launched a new versatile power relay to provide highly reliable performance for various high-load energy management applications.
Fujitsu launched an open platform for joint transportation and delivery systems in Japan.
TE Connectivity Plc reported to acquire Richards Manufacturing Co. to strengthen its service assistance in North America.

Omron Electronic Components introduced the G9EK High-Voltage DC Relay for next-generation energy applications and the G5Q global standard compact power relay, G5Q-HR, with improved performance and extended operational life.

Littelfuse, an industrial technology manufacturing firm, released the SRP1 Solid-State Relays (SSRs) family designed to meet the need for more reliable and long-lasting switching components in commercial and industrial equipment applications.
ABB launched the REX615 relay, a new addition to its 615 and 620 series, to deliver all-in-one protection and control for power generation and distribution purposes.

title: Medium Voltage Fuse Market to record $628 Mn by 2032, Says Global Market Insights Inc.
author: Global Market Insights Inc.
description: The medium voltage fuse market is predicted to grow significantly by 2032, driven by the expansion of power infrastructure and the need for reliable electrical protection. Expulsion fuses and capacitors are expected to see notable growth in this market.
